sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63002" key="lh|tourge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῃτ-ουργέω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῃτ-ουργία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῃτ-ουργός</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">λειτ</itype>-.</entryFree>
